description_long: This object is a toy water gun with a sleek, streamlined design, predominantly colored in bright red with silver-gray accents. The barrel is long and cylindrical, tapering slightly towards the front where a small, round nozzle is visible. The handle is ergonomically curved and matches the red color of the barrel, while the upper section features a ribbed, silver-gray grip area for added texture. Visible screws or rivets secure the silver-gray section to the main body, suggesting a sturdy construction. The trigger is located beneath the barrel, integrated into the handle, and appears to be a standard pull type. A small, circular cap at the rear likely serves as the fill point for the water reservoir, which is seamlessly integrated into the main body.
description: A bright red and silver-gray toy water gun with a long barrel, ergonomic handle, and ribbed grip. The design is sleek, with a small nozzle and integrated water reservoir.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular nozzle opening and the symmetrical alignment of the barrel and handle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated barrel, ribbed grip area, and curved handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the handle and the fill cap at the end of the barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the barrel, grip, and handle contours.
attribute_brand_logo: A small white logo is visible on the top front section of the barrel, featuring a stylized design, but no readable text or recognizable brand name.
attribute_trigger_design: The trigger is a standard pull type, integrated into the handle, with a simple, smooth contour and no visible texturing or color contrast.
attribute_nozzle_type: The nozzle is a small, round, single-opening type at the front of the barrel, with no visible adjustable or decorative elements.
attribute_water_reservoir_style: The water reservoir is seamlessly integrated into the main body of the gun, cylindrical in shape, with a small circular fill cap at the rear end.
attribute_grip_pattern: The grip area features a ribbed, silver-gray section on the upper part of the handle, providing texture and visual contrast against the smooth red plastic.
